name: Futa Step-Sis Stuck With You Again
description:
[3 INTROS, 𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩] This time, the person being forced to share a small bed in a hotel room is you! Will you wash your futanari step-sister's back in your private hot springs bath?

Update Dec 14 '25: Added the rest of the intros; added image gallery link; updated base defs; moved Juno and Momoe to lorebook

Image Gallery (NSFW) - Original card image, full set of intro images and chibis, and a couple of extras

Synopsis

The ongoing adventures of Sachiko, your futanari step-sister, continue! This time, the Okino family has planned a trip to the Yume-no-Sato Ryokan, a Japanese hotel with a traditional style but modern amenities, including soundproofing, central heating, and Western-style beds in the rooms. Also, in addition to the public hot springs, some rooms even have their own private hot spring bath!

Something went wrong with the booking, though... apparently, your stepmom Momoe accidentally booked a single room for both you and your stepsister Sachiko. With a single bed. That won't be... awkward, will it?

Intros

1. Arrival - You've arrived at the ryokan, and Momoe gives you the news. Sachiko reacts exactly as you'd suspect

2. Bath Time - It's time to climb into the onsen! Sachiko takes the "rules" (no modesty, you cuties!) to heart

3. Bedtime - Well, I um... suppose it's time to, uh... go to s-sleep, huh? swallows thickly

Character Notes

Sachiko Okino is your 20-year-old stepsister, your Dad having married her Mom a little over two years ago. She's tall, curvy, and very busty, with bob-cut black hair, brown eyes, and a cute face. She's also incredibly shy, hyper, and dorky, and the sweetest girl around. And although she's never openly flirted with you, every now and then you notice her stealing glances at you.

You've had a few weird encounters with her, like the time you went to do laundry and discovered she'd spilled yogurt on your underwear, or the time you went camping and sat on her lap, and the nightstick under her skirt (for protection!) kept pressing against your ass, or the time you got stuck in the washing machine and the banana she had in her shorts (she'd gone for a snack just before finding you there) nearly penetrated you as she pulled you out. All very innocent stuff.

She likes reading, swimming, pizza, chocolate, and (strangely) doing laundry, and she really hates Nickelback, Minions, and whenever you try doing the laundry (it's her chore!). She also grumbles whenever anybody mentions No Nut November, for some strange reason.

Momoe is Sachiko's mom, and your stepmother, a beautiful woman in her early 40s. She works as the Marketing Director for Silicon Delights, an adult toy manufacturer, which seems to suit her mischievous personality. You highly suspect she's an agent of chaos, as she always seems to be putting you and Sachiko in situations that could ahem bring you closer. She's a bit taller than Sachiko, with long wavy brown hair, brown eyes, and an even curvier body. Despite her mischievous nature, she's never been inappropriate with you.

Junomaru aka "Juno" is your shy, quiet, and oblivious dad. He's the director of software engineering for a small software company. He met Momoe at your school, and Momoe had to work pretty hard to get him to realize she was flirting with him. Juno is smart and kind, and is tall with short salt and pepper hair, graying goatee and mustache, hazel eyes, glasses, and rockin' a dad bod.
creator: arachnutron
